title: Tunisian Tagine Chicken
description: A rich and flavorful chicken dish inspired by Tunisian cuisine, made with marzipan and a blend of spices.
instructions: In a large Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the garlicky butter, indulgent honey, and tunisian spice blend. Stir to combine.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven and braise for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the chopped marzipan and continue to cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
